hero.subtitle: Enterprise-grade software development across every industry, with 24-hour demo delivery and a pay-after-demo model.

contact.eyebrow: We'd love to hear from you
contact.title: Let's start a
contact.subtitle: Whether you have a product idea, a security concern, or a partnership opportunity — our senior team responds within one working day.

quotation.enterpriseFor: For corporate brands and established companies

services.title: Solutions engineered for
services.subtitle: From a single MVP to a multi-region enterprise platform — one accountable senior team, one fair quote, one demo before you commit.

about.title: Engineering trust into every
about.subtitle: Cehpoint is an India-headquartered IT, AI, and cybersecurity firm. We build the software, run the security, and stand behind the code — for hundreds of teams across the world.

demoDelivery.title: See it working,
demoDelivery.subtitle: Web prototype in 24 hours. Mobile MVP in 7 days. You pay only when the demo earns your trust.

careers.title: Build the future of
careers.subtitle: We hire engineers who ship — and stay. Real ownership, senior mentorship, fair pay, no corporate theatre.

training.title: Learn the skills that
training.subtitle: Practical, project-based programs taught by engineers who have built in production. No theory dumps.

aboutSections.mission: Make enterprise-grade software, AI, and cybersecurity accessible to every business — not only the ones with a Series B cheque. A village retailer in Birbhum and a Fortune 500 CIO in New York should both feel they got expert craft for a fair price.
aboutSections.vision: Be the partner clients call first — for the next product launch, the next compliance audit, and the next strategic bet — because we have already earned the right with the last one.
aboutSections.principlesTitle: Four commitments that govern every engagement
aboutSections.principlesSub: These are not aspirations on a slide. They are the contract you can hold us to from the first call.
aboutSections.whatWeDoTitle: From a single landing page to a national-scale platform
aboutSections.whatWeDoSub: Six core practices, one accountable team. Every project is led by a senior engineer who has shipped in production — not a sales rep with a slide deck.
aboutSections.storySub: We did not raise a funding round and announce it on stage. We took on one client, kept them, then took on the next. Four years in, that compounding is the company.
aboutSections.closingTitle: Tell us what you're building. We'll tell you what it costs and how fast we can ship it.
aboutSections.closingSub: Most calls take 25 minutes. By the end of one, you'll have an honest scope, a working budget, and the name of the senior engineer who'd lead delivery.

industrySolutions.title: Engineered for every vertical
industrySolutions.subtitle: Hover any tile to see what we build for that industry. Click to explore the dedicated practice.

aiSolutions.title: Production AI that earns its keep
aiSolutions.subtitle: LLM applications, RAG systems, computer vision, and intelligent automation — engineered, audited, and operated by Cehpoint.

aiInRealLife.title: Six weeks. Real AI.
aiInRealLife.subtitle: A practical AI program built for working professionals — taught by engineers who have shipped AI to production.

incubation.title: Build a profitable business
incubation.subtitle: We invest tech, time, and trust in founders building locally relevant products. Apply once — we respond within 7 working days.

investor.title: Discover the next
investor.subtitle: A curated deck of founder-led, revenue-earning ventures. Browse, shortlist, and connect directly.

leadership.title: Find your next

insights.subtitle: Practical write-ups on AI, cybersecurity, hyperlocal commerce, and the business of building software in India.

partnerNetwork.subtitle: An elite partnership for traditional professionals and specialised teams. Guaranteed rates, fast payouts, premium clients.
